name: Relevance AI
description: Relevance AI is commonly used to support ai / automation workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Relevance AI when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in ai / automation work.
founderWorkflow: Use Relevance AI to keep ai / automation work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Relevance AI before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
